nasb.text: For I am already being poured out as a drink offering, and the time of my departure has come.

esv.text: For I am already being poured out as a drink offering, and the time of my departure has come.

cnv.text: 我已經被澆奠；我離世的時候也到了。

ccb.text: 我的生命如同奉献在祭坛上的酒正倾倒出来，我离世的日子快要到了。

csbs.text: 事实上，我已经在被浇奠了；我离开世界的时候已经临到了。
